description: Unified ledger view combining income and expense transactions. Summary cards show totals and net balance with color coding. Supports filtering by type, category, payment method, date range, and search. Dual layout with table on desktop and cards on mobile. Paginated at 50 items per page.

subDeliverables.title: Combined income + expense transaction view
subDeliverables.description: Merge ft_expenses and ft_income_records into a single chronological timeline, distinguishing transaction types visually.
acceptanceCriteria: Income and expenses appear in single timeline

subDeliverables.title: Summary cards
subDeliverables.description: Three summary cards at the top: total income, total expenses, and net balance. Net balance uses green for surplus and red for deficit.
acceptanceCriteria: Total income card with sum of income records
Total expenses card with sum of expenses
Net balance card with color coding (green/red)

subDeliverables.title: Filters
subDeliverables.description: Filter controls for transaction type (income/expense/all), category, payment method, date range, and text search across title and note fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Type filter: income, expense, or all
Search matches title and note fields

subDeliverables.title: Dual layout — table (desktop) / cards (mobile)
subDeliverables.description: Responsive layout using Table component on desktop (md:+) and card-based layout on mobile for optimal readability on each device.
acceptanceCriteria: Table layout visible on md: and above
Card layout visible below md: breakpoint
Both layouts show same transaction data
Payment method icons displayed in both layouts

subDeliverables.title: Pagination
subDeliverables.description: Paginate combined transaction list at 50 items per page with page navigation controls.
